columns.extraction_plan: The text states "SOC was ADT alone in 462 patients and ADT with docetaxel in 710 patients (table 1)." The treatment arms include SOC plus abiraterone (n=292) and SOC plus radiotherapy plus abiraterone (n=291). Table 1 provides the number and percentage of patients in each arm who received docetaxel.

The text states "SOC was ADT alone in 462 patients and ADT with docetaxel in 710 patients (table 1)." The control arms include SOC (n=296) and SOC plus radiotherapy (n=293). Table 1 provides the number and percentage of patients in each arm who received docetaxel.
